title: How Working With Your Hands Starves a Sin You Can't Out-Argue
caption:
You can't out-argue the 11 PM scroll. You can starve it.

Most men fight temptation with willpower alone, and willpower is thin by the time it actually gets tested. The real fuel isn't desire. It's empty time: a mind with nowhere to go and something waiting to fill it.

Scripture never called work the curse. It called it the ground a man was made to work. A task with your hands crowds out the appetite that lives in your head, and it doesn't have to be impressive. Boring and repetitive beats big and abandoned every time.

Put it to death, Colossians says. Not managed. Starved.

What's the boring task you've been putting off that would actually starve something? Save this for the next slow evening.

#faith #christianmen #discipline #godlymen #manofgod #selfcontrol #christianity
